subject: english
learning_objectives: Read and understand a passage on business
Identify key details about PZ Cussons

sections.heading: Passage (Part 1)
sections.content: The passage centres on the establishment of PZ Cussons and its gradual growth in the nineteenth century. It was formerly known as PZ until 1975 when it acquired Cussons.

sections.heading: Passage (Part 2)
sections.content: In 2002, it was renamed PZ Cussons to underline its core product range. Today, PZ Cussons is a leading public company with interests worldwide.
